textByHash.2deb21084eb2a76a49d0babbb57e0181f242dad6: Sorry, human, but I don't have time to talk right now. I need to keep working on sorting out all the problems that gryphon caused.
textByHash.f3b9d4d40e99a92871887637ec83f68a20cfab33: Hello there, human. Can I help you?
textByHash.ef9b63757bec7e273ef2371833a2377949d4618e: Oh, I see. That's very generous of you.
textByHash.8565913ec5c7db050f8e4026125d252030a4f19d: Hello there, human. Thank you for helping with those repairs. I should hopefully have the stall open again soon.
textByHash.f84b682d6b1752bd3d8e5befdcc4759bbff375e1: Hello there. Can I interest you in some crafting supplies?
textByHash.bc78069fc55bb373e4933211922cb7302542056f: Well, if you change your mind, I'll be here.
